_spec.purpose: Dedupe ledger for carousel topics. The routine MUST read this before topic selection and MUST append the chosen topic after delivery. No topic may repeat within 90 days unless a material new development exists AND the deck is framed as an update (hard fail otherwise).
_spec.matching: Judge semantic similarity, not string equality: compare candidate against topic + angle + entities + keywords of every entry from the last 120 days. Same underlying story reported by a different outlet or with a new URL is STILL a repeat.

entry_schema.headline: the cover line used
entry_schema.outcome_notes: filled by later runs if the human reports performance

entries.topic: Alaska's data center decision month, anchored by the STAK Energy North Slope AI data center lease revolt (ADL 422741)
entries.angle: The 500-plus vs fewer-than-12 public comment revolt on the STAK lease is one of four Alaska AI-infrastructure decisions in July 2026 (Air Force EUL Jun 29, GVEA turbine Jul 13, AKLNG vote Jul 16, STAK comment Jul 17); thesis 'four rooms, one open door' -- only the DNR comment process invites the public.
entities: Alaska DNR Division of Oil and Gas
entries.headline: 500 wrote in. Fewer than 12 said yes.
